items.title: Obi Releases Data Analysis of Tesla and Waymo Rideshare Pricing, Wait Times, and Sentiments
items.summary: Tesla's entry into the robotaxi market has introduced a completely new model for rideshare services, according to new data from Obi, the global real-time aggregator for rideshare prices.
